responsibilities: Active participant in science and innovation programs
Engaged in leadership and extracurricular activities
Interested in STEM education and research
Encourage student participation in academic competitions
Represent the organization in outreach programs
Support young innovators in developing creative solutions
Research and develop solutions to real-world challenges
Participate in science fairs and innovation competitions
Contribute to youth development and social impact programs

settings.name: Tanjiya Nowrin
settings.title: Grade 7 Student | Zero Olympiad Ambassador | Bangla Innovator Team Co-Leader
settings.bio: I am a Grade 7 student at Charfashion Residential Model School & College with a strong passion for science, innovation, leadership, and social impact. I actively participate in educational, scientific, and community development activities. As a Zero Olympiad Ambassador, Bangla Innovator Team Co-Leader, and Science Project Leader, I enjoy leading projects, solving real-world problems, and contributing to positive change through creativity and teamwork.

achievements.title: Zero Olympiad Ambassador
achievements.description: Appointed as an ambassador to promote academic excellence, Olympiad engagement, and STEM fields among young students.

achievements.title: Co-Leader, Bangla Innovator Team
achievements.description: Successfully led coordination, projects, and design solutions supporting budding inventors and creators.

achievements.title: Science Project Leader
achievements.description: Spearheaded research, robotics, and innovation models for school-based and independent science competitions.

achievements.title: Active Community Volunteer
achievements.description: Contributed to local educational campaigns, youth development drives, and environmental awareness actions.
